ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity of the product that should be maintained in inventory */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product that should be reordered when the inventory level falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "lot_serial_number" TEXT /* Lot or serial number of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in inventory */,
  "counted_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product counted during inventory */,
  "difference" INTEGER /* Difference between expected and counted quantity */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for inventory count */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Employee assigned to the inventory count */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Warehouse where the inventory is located */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location within the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Supervisor ID of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location within a warehouse */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location within the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "capacity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the location capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Employee responsible for the transaction */,
  "transaction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transaction */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "purchase_order_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "sales_order_number" TEXT /* Sales order number */,
  "sales_order_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_locations" (
  "product_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-location mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location within a warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product at that location */,
  "location_quantity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity at that location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_locations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory count */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who performed the count */,
  "count_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory count */,
  "counted_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity counted during the inventory count */,
  "count_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory count */,
  "count_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the inventory count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_counts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_counts_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task the employee is allowed to perform */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
